'''Oceanroot''' was a type of [[Foodstuff/Legends|beverage]] found at local [[Cantina/Legends|taverns]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Shaum Hii/Legends|Shaum Hii]] located in [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy's]] [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. Members of the [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Kian'thar]] [[Species/Legends|species]] [[Homeworld/Legends|native]] to the planet often socialized over [[Temperature/Legends|steaming]] cups of oceanroot.<ref name="Galaxy Guide 12" />

==Behind the scenes==
Oceanroot was mentioned in ''[[Galaxy Guide 12: Aliens — Enemies and Allies]]'', a supplement to ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]'' published by [[West End Games]] in [[1995]]. Within the book, oceanroot was mentioned in a section written by [[Craig Robert Carey]].<ref name="Galaxy Guide 12" />
